title: Coronavirus disease (COVID-19): For health professionals - Canada.ca
content:
## COVID-19: For health professionals
COVID-19 information for physicians, nurses, pharmacists and other health care providers

## Services and information

### Symptoms and risk factors
Clinician guide to signs and symptoms, frequency, asymptomatic transmission, risk factors and severity of disease
Authorized vaccines, safety, immunization guidance

### Testing and case reporting
Testing devices, diagnosis guidance, case report form, variants
Authorized treatments, guidance for clinical management of COVID-19 patients, care of long-term care residents

### Infection prevention and control
Acute care, long-term care, homecare, outpatient and ambulatory care
Modes of transmission, incubation period, re-infection, at risk groups

### Personal protective equipment (PPE)
Expedited access, types of masks, medical gowns and gloves, how to get PPE, reprocessing
Symptoms, infection prevention and control, immunization, testing, oral health

### Post COVID-19 condition
Symptoms lasting for weeks or months after a COVID-19 infection
Latest announcements, recalls and alerts, what’s new with medical devices, drugs and natural health products

### Educational resources
Factsheets, infographics, checklists
